title: Tick 18: ship D5 citation staleness across spec sdk-python sdk-typescript and CLI test on the outcomes spec repo
question: Does opensubagents outcomes pull 11 land the citation staleness downgrade in both reference SDKs document the rule in appendix-a-rubric md add three sdk-python tests and pass its own outcome gate?
success_criteria: opensubagents outcomes pull 11 opened by the orchestrator with auto-merge armed
sdk-python verifier py adds STALE_CITATION_DAYS constant and applies the downgrade post-score with floor 1
sdk-typescript verifier ts ports the same algorithm one-to-one
specification appendix-a-rubric md documents the staleness downgrade under the citation_quality dimension
sdk-python test_verifier py has 3 new tests covering downgrade fresh and floor-at-1 and the full 27-test suite passes
dogfood pair outcomes citation-staleness scores at or above 3.5 against the new verifier

capabilities: outcomes pull 11 opened with auto-merge armed
Python and TypeScript SDKs port the same staleness algorithm
3 new sdk-python tests pass plus the existing 24 tests
